title: Large Metal Flower Pot Vase Bucket Hanging Garden Planter with Drainage Hole, Balcony Home Decor, Detachable Hook (10 Pcs with Assorted 10 Colours) Multicolor
features: Top diameter 13.5cm, Bottom diameter 9.5cm, Pot height 13cm, Hook length 16cm.
10 different colours flower pots are made from durable metal, no worry for breaking.
Removable handle design makes it suitable for various occasions, desk, window, wall, fence, anywhere indoor or outdoor.
Perfect for potted plants, dried flowers, silk flowers or even be a desktop storage basket.
Small hole at the bottom for drainage and breath (for our no hole pots search for Amazon Code ASIN B085G9K7HS).
description: Product Description Why choose GIOVARA? We founded the GIOVARA brand in 2018 to help our customers lead a healthier lifestyle. We pride ourselves on our products, they cover all aspects of your life and make your life more comfortable. We love helping people and making their lives easier. That is also the value of our brand. If you need any help, we are here for you. If you're not satisfied, we'll do it right. 𝗧𝗵𝗶𝘀 𝗶𝘀 𝗚𝗜𝗢𝗩𝗔𝗥𝗔, 𝗻𝗶𝗰𝗲 𝘁𝗼 𝗺𝗲𝗲𝘁 𝘆𝗼𝘂 Why we love - GIOVARA hanging flowerpot？ Do you want to bring nature indoors? - Available in 10 different colors of modern style flower pots, adding elegance and beauty to your place. - Add a pop of color to exterior walls and fences with this beautiful hanging flower pot. Ideal for brightening up dull brick walls and sheds with your favorite flowers or plants. Making an attractive focal point on your balcony - especially if you plant brightly coloured flowers. Perfect for indoor, outdoor, balcony, garden, courtyard, coffee shop, flower shop, household decoration, nursery or office, create a fashion and elegant life! Suitable for hanging in any place you like, bringing fresh atmosphere to your life and home. Build a beautiful home DURABLE IRON METAL Our flower pots are made of high-quality metal to withstand heavy weight; the surface paint effectively reduces the risk of rust even in rainy or wet conditions. WITH DRAINAGE HOLES The bottom of the pot has a drainage hole to drain excess water and keep the plant healthy. It can also allow the plant to breathe, and the root system will become more robust. DETACHABLE HOOK These flower pots are equipped with a detachable hook to meet your multiple uses and save storage space. Colorful hanging planters can be hung anywhere. Do you feel that your house and garden lack color? Are you looking for something to decorate your house and garden? This rainbow-coloured flower pot set is your choice! DESKTOP FLOWER POT Even with the hooks off, these pots can do a lot. They can be used as tabletop pots for succulents, potted plants or artificial plants, as well as for dried or silk flowers. STORAGE JAR These planters are great for storing small household items. Put our pots on your desk, sill, table etc., therefore you get 10 small decorative storage buckets. CHARMING FLOWER POT GIOVARA coloured pots come in the ideal shape and size to create bold, vibrant colours that look great on railings or garden fences. It is the first choice for creating colorful gardens.
